purpose: Inspectable natural-language fixtures for the V1 image/text-to-Blender runtime.

cases.description: Text-only request for one hero subject in a simple studio scene.
cases.user_text: Create a compact friendly robot in a clean studio display scene. It should be easy to generate as one subject and place on a small pedestal.

SceneInterpreter.user_goal: Create a compact friendly robot display.
subject_summaries: A compact friendly robot with rounded panels.
SceneInterpreter.environment_summary: A clean small studio display area.

SceneSpecCompiler.title: Compact Robot Studio Display
SceneSpecCompiler.user_goal: Create a compact friendly robot in a clean studio display scene.

environment.description: A small clean studio display area with a simple pedestal.

lighting.description: Soft studio lighting with a gentle key light.

camera.framing: full subject centered with some floor visible

subjects.description: A compact friendly robot with rounded white panels and blue accent lights.
subjects.appearance: rounded body, small antenna, expressive screen face, clean toy-like finish
subjects.pose_or_state: standing upright on a small pedestal

ConceptPromptPlanner.final_preview_prompt: A compact friendly robot on a small pedestal in a clean studio display scene.

subject_prompts.subject_robot: Compact friendly robot, rounded white panels, blue accent lights, expressive face screen, three-quarter view.

scene_prompts: Clean studio display area, small pedestal, soft shadows, uncluttered floor.
ConceptPromptPlanner.negative_prompt: blurry, cropped, extra limbs, messy background

cases.description: Chinese request with explicit subject, scene, and style reference bindings.
cases.user_text: 请根据图1生成一个黄色棉花娃娃主体，图2是街角店铺场景参考，图3只控制柔软棉布质感。主体要适合放进 Blender 场景，四肢灵活，头身比可爱。

declared_bindings.notes: 图3 controls soft cotton material feel.

SceneInterpreter.user_goal: Create a yellow cotton plush-like hero subject in a bright street-corner shop scene.
subject_summaries: Yellow cotton-doll-like character with flexible limbs and cute proportions.
SceneInterpreter.environment_summary: Street-corner shop display based on the scene reference.
SceneInterpreter.style_summary: soft cotton texture, cute toy proportions, clean generated asset silhouette

SceneSpecCompiler.title: Yellow Plush Street Shop
SceneSpecCompiler.user_goal: Create a yellow cotton plush-like hero subject in a bright street-corner shop scene.

lighting.description: Soft daylight with gentle shop-window fill.

camera.framing: full body hero subject with storefront context visible

subjects.description: Yellow cotton plush doll with cute large head and flexible limbs.
subjects.appearance: soft cotton fabric, simple stitched details, rounded head, short flexible arms and legs
subjects.pose_or_state: standing naturally, ready for Blender placement

constraints: avoid over-complex cloth hair or tiny unreadable details

ConceptPromptPlanner.final_preview_prompt: A yellow cotton plush doll with cute proportions standing in a bright street-corner shop display, soft daylight, clean Blender-friendly composition.

subject_prompts.subject_plush: Yellow cotton plush doll, large cute head, flexible small limbs, soft fabric texture, three-quarter full-body view, clean silhouette.

scene_prompts: Bright street-corner shop display, simple storefront, clean floor, small display platform, soft daylight.

cases.description: Two-subject layout with a layout reference and explicit spatial relation.

cases.description: Vehicle subject with texture and garage scene references.
cases.user_text: Build a small moon rover model for Blender. The first image is the rover body reference, the second image is only the dusty metal texture, and the garage scene can be a simple maintenance bay.

subject_prompts.subject_moon_rover: Small moon rover, boxy chassis, four rugged wheels, dusty metal panels, three-quarter view, isolated clean silhouette.

scene_prompts: Simple maintenance bay garage, painted concrete floor, tool wall, cool overhead lighting.

cases.description: Furniture subject plus style reference for a room-scale scene.

cases.description: User-provided sample: Wuthering Waves chibi Phoebe and Florollo duo on a beach with chair and sandcastle props.
cases.user_text: 我想看到一个鸣潮的Q版角色菲比和弗糯糯在海滩上，旁边是沙滩椅和沙子城堡。

SceneInterpreter.user_goal: Create a beach scene with two chibi game-style characters, beach chair, and sand castle props.
subject_summaries: Chibi Florollo character; user text wrote 弗糯糯 and should resolve to 弗洛洛
SceneInterpreter.environment_summary: Sunny beach with sand, shallow water, and playful props.
SceneInterpreter.style_summary: cute Q-version game character style, bright beach colors, Blender-friendly silhouettes

SceneSpecCompiler.title: Chibi Beach Duo With Sand Castle
SceneSpecCompiler.user_goal: Create a beach scene with chibi Phoebe and Florollo characters beside a beach chair and sand castle.

style.color_palette: sunny sand, sea blue, pastel character colors

environment.description: A bright sandy beach with shallow sea water in the background.

lighting.description: Warm clear daylight with soft beach shadows.

camera.framing: show both chibi characters and the nearby beach props

subjects.canonical_identity: 鸣潮 角色 菲比
subjects.description: A Q-version Phoebe-inspired fantasy girl character for a playful beach scene.
subjects.appearance: cute oversized head, bright fantasy outfit, simplified hair and accessories, readable chibi silhouette
subjects.pose_or_state: standing on the sand facing the viewer
subjects.placement_hint: left foreground near the sand castle

subjects.canonical_identity: 鸣潮 角色 弗洛洛
subjects.description: A Q-version Florollo character resolved from the user's 弗糯糯 wording.
subjects.appearance: round chibi proportions, playful expression, simplified costume details
subjects.pose_or_state: standing beside Phoebe on the beach
subjects.placement_hint: right of Phoebe near the beach chair

subjects.description: A simple foldable beach chair beside the characters.
subjects.appearance: striped fabric, simple wooden or metal frame

subjects.description: A small sand castle built beside the chibi characters.
subjects.appearance: bucket-shaped towers, simple flag, sandy material

spatial_relations.notes: Keep the two chibi characters visually grouped.
Chair should be visible but not block the characters.

constraints: keep chibi silhouettes simple for image-to-3D
all props must fit on the same beach ground plane

ConceptPromptPlanner.final_preview_prompt: High-artistry polished target render: Q-version Wuthering Waves characters 菲比 and 弗洛洛 together on a sunny beach, with a striped beach chair and a small sand castle nearby, coherent warm daylight, appealing front three-quarter composition.

subject_prompts.subject_phoebe_chibi: Subject-only Q-version 菲比 from Wuthering Waves, oversized head, simplified bright fantasy outfit, cute expression, clean neutral studio background, front three-quarter full-body silhouette.
subject_prompts.subject_florollo_chibi: Subject-only Q-version 弗洛洛 from Wuthering Waves, canonical identity resolved from user wording 弗糯糯, round proportions, playful fantasy outfit, clean neutral studio background, front three-quarter full-body silhouette.

scene_prompts: Scene-only sunny sandy beach, shallow blue water, striped beach chair, small sand castle, shells, soft beach shadows, open placement area for two chibi characters. No characters or humanoids.
ConceptPromptPlanner.negative_prompt: photoreal human, crowded beach, complex tiny accessories, unreadable costume details, cropped characters
identity_notes: Fixture identity note: subject_phoebe_chibi maps to 鸣潮 角色 菲比 / Phoebe for dry-run prompt validation; live official-source research is deferred to Round04.
Fixture identity note: subject_florollo_chibi maps to 鸣潮 角色 弗洛洛 / Florollo and user wording 弗糯糯 for dry-run prompt validation; live official-source research is deferred to Round04.

cases.description: User-provided sample: League of Legends chibi Little Gwen reference image on a chessboard with many chess pieces.
cases.user_text: 我想看到英雄联盟的Q版角色小小格温图片1在棋盘上，旁边是很多国际象棋棋子。

input_images.user_declared_label: 图片1 小小格温参考

declared_bindings.notes: 图片1 controls the chibi Little Gwen subject reference.

SceneInterpreter.user_goal: Create a chibi Little Gwen-inspired character on a chessboard surrounded by many chess pieces.
subject_summaries: Chibi Little Gwen-inspired blue-haired character from image 1
SceneInterpreter.environment_summary: A large chessboard surface used as a stage.
SceneInterpreter.style_summary: cute chibi game-character style, blue magical accents, board-game props

SceneSpecCompiler.title: Little Gwen On Chessboard
SceneSpecCompiler.user_goal: Create a chibi Little Gwen-inspired character from image 1 standing on a chessboard with many chess pieces nearby.

style.color_palette: cyan blue, dark board squares, white and black chess pieces

environment.description: A large chessboard surface with alternating dark and light squares.

lighting.description: Cool magical spotlight with soft reflections on the board.

camera.framing: show the chibi character clearly with chess pieces surrounding her

subjects.canonical_identity: 英雄联盟 小小格温
subjects.description: A Q-version Little Gwen-inspired blue-haired character based on image 1.
subjects.appearance: bright cyan twin-tail hair, cute chibi proportions, magical blue scissor-like energy accents, simplified dress details
subjects.pose_or_state: standing on the chessboard and waving toward the viewer
subjects.scale_hint: small chibi scale but larger than chess pieces

subjects.description: A group of many black and white international chess pieces around the character.
subjects.appearance: pawns, knights, bishops, rooks, queen and king in simplified clean shapes
subjects.placement_hint: surrounding the character on nearby chessboard squares

spatial_relations.notes: Chess pieces should frame the hero without hiding the image-1 character silhouette.

constraints: preserve image 1 as the subject reference
keep the hero face and hair readable
avoid chess pieces blocking the character

ConceptPromptPlanner.final_preview_prompt: High-artistry polished target render using the generated image-guided Little Gwen subject concept and the generated scene concept as visual references: 小小格温 from image_little_gwen_ref standing clearly on a large chessboard, surrounded by many black and white chess pieces that frame but do not block her, cool magical blue accents, coherent front three-quarter lighting.

subject_prompts.subject_little_gwen: Use input reference image image_little_gwen_ref as the required subject identity reference: Q-version Little Gwen character, cyan blue twin-tail hair, cute face, simplified fantasy outfit, magical blue scissor-like energy accents, clean neutral studio background, full-body front three-quarter view. Do not include chessboard, chess pieces, or scene background.

scene_prompts: Scene-only large chessboard stage with alternating dark and light squares, many black and white pawns, rooks, bishops, knights, queen and king arranged around an empty central square, cool magical lighting, clean Blender-friendly layout. No characters, no Little Gwen, no humanoids.
ConceptPromptPlanner.negative_prompt: cropped face, hidden character, too many tiny unreadable pieces, photoreal human, messy board
identity_notes: Fixture identity note: subject_little_gwen maps to 英雄联盟 小小格温 / Little Gwen for dry-run prompt validation; live official-source research is deferred to Round04.

cases.description: User-provided sample: explorer robot rover on the moon with cratered lunar regolith.

SceneInterpreter.user_goal: Create an explorer robot rover on the moon beside pitted lunar regolith.
subject_summaries: explorer robot rover with rugged wheels
SceneInterpreter.environment_summary: moon surface with cratered regolith and small pits
SceneInterpreter.style_summary: semi-realistic sci-fi exploration vehicle, dusty lunar material

SceneSpecCompiler.title: Explorer Rover On Moon
SceneSpecCompiler.user_goal: Create an explorer robot rover on the moon beside pitted lunar regolith.

style.color_palette: gray regolith, white rover panels, dark sky

environment.description: A cratered lunar surface with many pits, uneven dust, and low horizon.

lighting.description: Hard low-angle sunlight with strong shadows on the moon surface.

camera.framing: show the rover and the cratered regolith around it

subjects.description: A compact explorer robot car designed for lunar terrain.
subjects.appearance: rugged wheels, boxy sensor mast, small antenna, white and gray panels with dusty edges
subjects.pose_or_state: parked on uneven moon dust near small craters
subjects.placement_hint: front left on the pitted lunar ground

spatial_relations.target_region: cluster of small pits in the foreground

constraints: moon surface must include cratered regolith
keep rover silhouette clean for image-to-3D

ConceptPromptPlanner.final_preview_prompt: High-artistry polished target render using the generated rover subject concept and generated moon-surface scene concept as visual references: a compact explorer robot rover on the moon, parked beside cratered pitted lunar regolith, low wide front three-quarter camera, hard coherent sunlight, long shadows, dark sky, rover large enough to inspect.

subject_prompts.subject_explorer_rover: Subject-only compact explorer robot rover, rugged wheels, boxy sensor mast, small antenna, white and gray dusty panels, clean neutral studio background, full vehicle visible, front three-quarter silhouette. Do not include moon terrain, craters, astronauts, or scene background.

scene_prompts: Scene-only moon surface with pitted lunar regolith, many small craters, dusty uneven ground, distant ridge, black sky, hard low-angle sunlight, open foreground area for rover placement. No rover, no astronaut, no vehicle.
ConceptPromptPlanner.negative_prompt: earth plants, wet mud, city background, smooth flat floor, unreadable tiny wires

cases.description: Uploaded image exists but the user does not bind its purpose; controller must wait for user clarification.
